hero.title: Gucunga Ibikoresho
hero.subtitle: Kurikirana, cunga, kandi uvugurure ibikoresho by'ikigo cyawe mu buryo byoroshye.
hero.subtitle2: Uburyo bugezweho bwo gukurikirana, gucunga no gusangira ibikoresho mu kigo cyawe. Byakozwe n'abanyeshuri, byagenewe abanyeshuri.

feature.title: Ibyo ukeneye byose ngo ucunge ibikoresho
feature.subtitle: Ibikoresho simusiga byagenewe korohereza buri wese mu kigo gukurikirana ibikoresho.
feature.iotTrackingDesc: Kugenzura umunota ku wundi n'imenyesha mu gihe igikoresho gisohowe ahatemewe.
feature.qrScanningDesc: Kwinjira no gusohoka ukoresheje code za QR, n'amafoto yemeza ihererekanya ry'ibikoresho.
feature.riskAnalyticsDesc: Raporo zicukumbuye, isesengura ry'imikoreshereze, n'ingamba zo gukumira ibyago byo kwibwa.

howItWorks.title: Biroroshye nka
howItWorks.subtitle: Kuva ushakisha kugezaugaruye, igikorwa cyose gitwara iminota mike.

users.title: Ninde ukoresha
users.subtitle: Kuva ku banyeshuri kugera ku bayobozi, buri wese yungukira mu micungire y'ibikoresho inoze.
users.studentsDesc: Shakisha, saba, kandi ukurikirane ibikoresho mu buryo bworoshye
users.securityDesc: Kurikirana amakuru, shakisha ibikoresho byabuze, n'umutekano w'ikigo
users.gatekeepersDesc: Emeza ibikoresho, soma QR code mu gusohoka, no kugenzura abinjira

contact.title: Tuvugishe
contact.subtitle: Ufite ibibazo? Twishimiye kumva ibyo utubwira. Ohereza ubutumwa!
